welcome_description:
Kun Mardacha Gaazexaa Digitaalaa ti.
Barreessoonni wantoota dabarsuu fi fayyadamtoonni bituu danda'u.

🔐 Nageenya fi amantii dursee!

browse.title: 📚 Wantoota jiran:
browse.empty:
📭 Yeroo ammaa wanti tokko hin jiru.
Dafanii ni dhufa!

purchase.success:
✅ Bituun keessan milkaa'e!

📖 {title}
💰 {price} Birrii

Wantichi kun mankitaabaa keessanitti dabale.
purchase.failed: ❌ Bituun hin milkaane. Yeroo biraa yaali.

author.welcome:
✍️ Anaadhufu barreessaa!

Amma wantoota dabsachuu dandeessu.

/upload fayyadami wantoota dabsachuuf.

📌 Hubachiisa:
• Faayilota PDF qofa
• Mirqa qabduu himuu qaba
• Gatii bulchaa qaba

upload.instruction:
📤 Wantoota Dabsachuu

Odeeffannoo armaan gadii tartiibaan ergaa:

1️⃣ Mataduree
2️⃣ Ibsa
3️⃣ Ramaddii (ebook, magazine, handout, question_bank, research_paper)
4️⃣ Gatii (Birriin)
5️⃣ Faayila PDF
upload.price_prompt:
✅ Gatiin fudhatame!
Amma faayila PDF ergaa.
upload.invalid_price: ❌ Gatii sirrii hin taane! Lakkoofsa ergaa.
upload.file_prompt:
❌ PDF ergaa!
Faayila akka sanadaatti ergaa.
upload.success:
✅ Wantoon keessan milkaa'ee dabe!

📖 {title}
💰 {price} Birrii

Erga bulchaan mirkaneessee booda ni maxxanfama.

library.title: 📖 *Mankitaabaa Koo*
library.empty:
📭 Mankitaabaan keessan duwwaa dha.
Wantoota bituun guusaa!
